label: Helioprism Lake
description: Helioprism Lake occupies a shallow basin cut into Kharion Prismworld’s vitreous crust, its perimeter defined by straight runs and precise angles rather than a continuous shore. The water presents as a dense, glass-clear sheet that breaks incoming meridian glare into immobile bars of color, while intervals of absolute shadow pass across it as clean-edged planes. Beneath the surface, rectilinear shelves of dark crystal descend in step-like terraces that mirror the planet’s fracture-grid geometry. The air above remains unnaturally laminar, and wave motion resolves into repeating polygonal ripples aligned to the lattice-fronts.
